items.title: Transfers PSV: 'Fulham brengt verhoogd bod uit op Pepi'
items.summary: VI volgt het transfernieuws bij PSV op de voet, zeker nu de winterse transferwindow in aantocht is. De doelwitten van de Eindhovenaren, duiding van de clubwatcher, of aandacht in buitenlandse media. We verzamelen alles hier.

items.title: Bournemouth v Liverpool: Premier League – live
items.summary: Match at Vitality Stadium kicks off at 5.30pm (GMT) Live scores | Share your thoughts with Billy via email 2 min: Gomez goes long down the line to Salah, who scampers after it but hooks his right-footed cross into the fans behind the goal. Liverpool get things going in their off-white away kit. The weather is miserable. Continue reading...

items.title: VI Live: Van Dijk maakt fout goed, NEC weer naast PEC
items.summary: Zaterdag staan er weer veel fraaie potjes in binnen- en buitenland op het programma. NEC krijgt bezoek van PEC Zwolle, FC Twente speelt tegen Excelsior en in het buitenland komen onder meer Liverpool, Manchester City, Bayern München en Real Madrid in actie. Volg het voetbal in de VI Live.

items.title: Wintertransfers Eredivisie seizoen 2025/26: alle clubs op een rij
items.summary: De transferperiode is weer losgebarsten. In dit overzicht van VI vind je alle afgeronde, door clubs bevestigde, wintertransfers van de achttien Eredivisie-clubs. Clubs in Nederland kunnen tot en met 3 februari spelers aantrekken .

items.title: Grim grapt na solide tweede helft: 'Reglementswijziging gehad'
items.summary: Ajax-trainer Fred Grim blikte tevreden terug op de gewonnen wedstrijd tegen FC Volendam. De technische staf kon zowaar een keer rustig op de bank blijven zitten, in plaats van een hyperspannende slotfase beleven. Grim maakte er grapjes over.

items.title: Transfers Feyenoord: Deijl zondag al inzetbaar tegen Heracles
items.summary: VI volgt het transfernieuws bij Feyenoord op de voet, zeker nu de winterse transferwindow in aantocht is. De doelwitten van de Rotterdammers, duiding van de clubwatcher, of aandacht in buitenlandse media. We verzamelen alles hier.

items.title: From 'impossible task' to 'hope' - will West Ham stay up?
items.summary: Back-to-back Premier League wins have taken West Ham United to within two points of 17th.

items.title: Ref's 'courageous' call denies Man City penalty on Premier League debut
items.summary: Referee Farai Hallam was praised for choosing not to award Manchester City a penalty against Wolves on his Premier League debut.

items.title: Guehi has something special - Guardiola
items.summary: Manchester City boss Pep Guardiola is really pleased with how new signing Marc Guehi played on his debut for his new team in their 2-0 win over Wolves.

items.title: Redknapp-owned Taurus Bay denied win in controversial photo finish
items.summary: Former Premier League manager Harry Redknapp was denied victory in a controversial final race on Cheltenham's Trials Day card on Saturday.

items.title: Teen star Caluori scores four tries as Saracens overwhelm Newcastle
items.summary: Noah Caluori scored four tries as Saracens overwhelmed Newcastle 73-14 at StoneX Stadium.

items.title: Romero denies Burnley their first win since October with late headed equaliser
items.summary: FREE TO WATCH: Highlights from Burnley’s match against Tottenham Hotspur in the Premier League.

items.title: Manchester City get back on track against Wolves despite VAR handball rarity
items.summary: Manchester City have a first Premier League win in four games and Wolves a first defeat after going five unbeaten in all competitions after a fixture in which the referee, Farai Hallam, on his top-flight debut, dared to stick with his decision not to award a penalty despite being sent for a pitchside review by the video assistant referee. That was for a Yerson Mosquera handball and infuriated Pep Guardiola, though after their dire recent form a first three points since 27 December is what matters. Continue reading...

items.title: Wrexham strike twice in injury time to stun QPR
items.summary: Wrexham scored twice in stoppage time to come from behind and pull off an incredible 3-2 victory at QPR.

items.title: Berman: Rodman deal shows new rule is working
items.summary: NWSL commissioner Jessica Berman cited Trinity Rodman's new deal as evidence that the league's new High Impact Player is working as intended: to retain and attract top players.

items.title: Haaland rested as City cruise past Wolves
items.summary: Erling Haaland had to settle for a substitute's role as Manchester City returned to winning ways with a comfortable 2-0 victory over relegation-threatened Wolves.

items.title: Infantino: Resale will drive up WC ticket prices
items.summary: FIFA president Gianni Infantino said that many fans who have applied for tickets for the 2026 World Cup will be looking to sell them for profit on resale sites, thus driving up the cost of ticket prices.

items.title: Romero hits late equaliser to spare Tottenham
items.summary: Lyle Foster scored a late winner for Burnley as they kept their Premier League survival hopes alive with a 2-1 win over Tottenham.

items.title: Wilson stunner snatches last-gasp victory for Fulham to punish Brighton
items.summary: Harry Wilson’s taste for the spectacular continues to decorate Fulham’s season. Deep in added time, the Welshman’s free-kick beat Bart Verbruggen, whose failure to keep the ball out completed a regrettable afternoon for both goalkeepers. As in August, when the two teams fought out a draw on opening day, Brighton rued missed chances and Fulham took theirs when they came. Fabian Hürzeler’s team continue to make the mistakes that keep them landlocked in mid-table. Continue reading...

items.title: Romero to the rescue as Spurs snatch point at Burnley
items.summary: Cristian Romero's 90th-minute equaliser spared under-pressure Tottenham boss Thomas Frank an embarrassing defeat at second-bottom Burnley as the defender's header snatched a 2-2 draw.
